title: Percentage Difference Calculator Formula
excerpt: Hello, Just wondering if there was a way of getting percentage differences for two numbers using a forumula and then that showing as Red if under 100% or Green if over 100%, this will calculating for each row so for exam…

posts.author: EnixGG (Jordan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Just wondering if there was a way of getting percentage differences for two numbers using a forumula and then that showing as Red if under 100% or Green if over 100%, this will calculating for each row so for example

Main: Shop | Oranges % | Apples %
SUB TASK
Oranges | Actual | Target | % of Actual vs Target (Oranges %)
Apples | Actual | Target | % of Apples Actual vs Target (Apples %)

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jordan,

You should better formulate your request and include screenshots as it is not really clear.

As far as color-coding a cell/row based on its data, see https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360015468399-Conditional-Coloring.

Want to get rid of the formula column? and write formulas that support multiple lines, variables and can update various columns at once? Take a look at the Advanced Formula Booster at https://mdboosters.com*
